hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | grep -q '\.rs$' && make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" fmt >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
output=$(make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" clippy 2>&1) || echo "$output" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("Clippy failed - fix before stopping:\n" + .)}'
output=$(make -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" test 2>&1) || echo "$output" | jq -Rs '{decision:"block", reason:("Tests failed - fix before stopping:\n" + .)}'
